user.title: Welcome to ESPHome Display
user.description:
This integration simplifies sending notifications to your ESPHome display devices.

No YAML configuration needed—everything is set up through the web interface!

add_device.title: Add Display Device
add_device.description: Configure a new ESPHome display device. {devices_added} device(s) already configured.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this display (e.g., 'Kitchen Display')
data_description.esphome_device: The device name from your ESPHome YAML (e.g., 'kitchen_screen')
data_description.default_severity: Default alert level when not specified: info (blue), warn (amber), alert (red), question (green)
data_description.todo_entity: Optional: Link a Home Assistant to-do list to display tasks on the device

add_more_devices.title: Add Another Device?
add_more_devices.description:
You've successfully configured {devices_added} display device(s).

Would you like to add another display?

error.name_exists: A device with this name already exists

data_description.default_timeout: How long notifications should display by default before auto-closing (0 = manual dismiss only)

notify.name: Send Notification
notify.description: Display a notification on an ESPHome display device

device.name: Device
device.description: Select the display device to send notification to

title.name: Title
title.description: Optional: Bold header (defaults to severity name if omitted)

severity.name: Severity Level
severity.description: Alert level: info (blue), warn (amber), alert (red), question (green)

timeout.name: Auto-Dismiss Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds until notification automatically closes (0 = manual dismiss)

clear_notification.name: Clear Notification
clear_notification.description: Dismiss the current notification on a display device
